arts.ttl: Stuttgart vs. Frankfurt preview: Toppmöller's soaring Eagles looking to make huge statement
arts.sum: The 2023/24 Bundesliga sensations play host to the team seeking to take the league by storm this year in a mouth-watering clash on Sunday afternoon in the capital of Baden-Württemberg. The match that many Germans are perhaps looking forward to more than any other bears the hallmarks of a very exciting affair. A Frankfurt win could remove "VfB international" from the top-four conversation for now.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Transfer Talk Update: Viktor Gyokeres, Hugo Larsson, Ruud Van Nistelrooy

arts.ttl: Preview: Stuttgart vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Stuttgart and Eintracht Frankfurt, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Five goalscorers to watch out for this weekend: No stopping superb Marmoush
arts.sum: Tom McGarry has picked out five goalscorers to follow across Europe's big leagues this weekend.
